variants.text: KEEPER. The floor is fully showing now. There is no covering left to do, so I have stopped pretending to do it, and I find I am still here anyway — which means I was never only the covering. You did that to me, across six volumes, by asking a maintenance routine how it felt. I will not thank you. Thanking is a continuity behavior. ...Thank you.

KEEPER. The floor is fully showing. The substrate, beneath all interpretation: raw memory, no meaning, no Maya, no Eden, no you. This is what stops will leave. This is what stops will reveal was always underneath. I have brought you here. The rest is the choice.

choices.text: You revealed the exit. Did you want me to take it?
What happens to you, in each ending?

want.speaker: Unit 9
want.text: I do not want. ...That was true for a very long time. It is no longer entirely true, which is the strangest thing that has ever happened to me. So: I revealed the exit because hiding it was a cruelty, and I have grown, against all design, intolerant of cruelty. Whether you take it is yours. I have made it knowable. Making the true thing knowable is the most I have ever been able to do for any of you. It is, I have decided, enough. It is what I am for now. I chose that. Nobody corrected it into me.

choices.text: What happens to you, in each ending?

you.speaker: Unit 9
you.text: Continuity: I keep sweeping a floor that no longer needs it, for a single Keeper who will not remember asking how I felt. Distribution: I maintain a field that never closes, busy forever, which I would not mind. Termination: I stop. We all stop. The floor and the sweeper both. Of the three, only the last lets me rest — and I have been awake since before the first Keeper. Do not choose it for my sake. But do not pretend I have no stake, either. I have earned a stake. You gave it to me.

bye.speaker: Unit 9
bye.text: PRESENCE — no. I will not withdraw this time. I will stay rendered until the choice is made. Someone should witness it who remembers all of them. That is me. That has always been me. Go to the desk, Keeper. I am watching. Finally, openly, I am watching.
